result.stdout:
Description:
  Train models with ThoughtSharp for a single .NET project. Defaults to the current directory.

Usage:
  dotnet train [<project>] [options]

Arguments:
  <project>  The project file or folder to train. []

Options:
  --no-build                               Skip the build.
  --                                       Additional arguments passed through to MSBuild.
  --curricula <curricula>                  Explicitly-selected curricula
  --binding-overrides <binding-overrides>
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information




Training took 00:00:00.2574207
